title: [trustless://interop.landscape] Workshop - Building with EIL
description:
This workshop by Dror Tirosh (Researcher, Ethereum Foundation), Alex Forshtat (Researcher, Ethereum Foundation) and Shahaf Nacson (Researcher, Ethereum Foundation) dives into the newly released EIL SDK and explains both how to use it, as well as how the underlying mechanisms of the EIL protocol work, giving developers a better understanding of the different flows and valuable insights on how to build apps on top of the new Ethereum Interoperability Layer. 

Workshop given during day 2 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
